checks.finding: 152 pending tasks — growth rate (5-8/cycle) FAR exceeds burn rate (1/cycle). At current velocity, queue drains in 150+ cycles while adding ~750 more tasks. Priority sprawl: P1 to P77 (healthy range: P1-P30).
Confirmed duplicate pair at top of queue: E2E-FACTION-GATE-WIRE (P1) and GDC-FACTION-CONTENT-50-GATE (P2) — both describe wiring rep>=50 gate into card_pool. Wastes an entire dev cycle.
Fix rate 26.3% (10 fixed / 38 found). Studio finds bugs faster than it fixes them. At this rate, backlog grows perpetually.
39 insights accumulated — no pruning. Insights >30 reduce signal-to-noise ratio for the director.
123 patterns in studio_learnings.json — without pruning/dedup, the list becomes a cognitive dump. Many patterns may be redundant or obsolete.
Events at 111/200 — rotation threshold approaching. Pre-rotate now to avoid hitting limit mid-cycle.
19 pending questions accumulating without director response. No batching/prioritization mechanism. Risk of director fatigue.
25 agents tracked in agent_performance. All 16 specialists have dedicated roles. Missing: Queue Health Auditor, I18N Completeness Auditor.
75 cycles, alternating dev/test, no cycle_type unknown >4. Good discipline.

new_specialists_proposed.name: QUEUE_HEALTH_AUDITOR
new_specialists_proposed.purpose: Each cycle: count pending, measure growth rate, detect duplicates by keyword, normalize priorities, enforce max 80 pending tasks by archiving lowest-priority stale tasks.

new_specialists_proposed.name: I18N_COMPLETENESS_AUDITOR
new_specialists_proposed.purpose: Grep all .gd files for French string literals not using I18nRegistry.t(). Generate tasks for every hardcoded string.
